title: Bezente Assorted Rainbow Latex Balloons, 100 Pack 12 inch Round Helium Bright Color Balloons for Birthday Bridal Shower Wedding Party Decorations
bullet_points: Rainbow Themed Party- Assorted balloons can be used in rainbow themed party or mix with any color to create a perfect rainbow themed wedding, graduations party, birthday party, bridal shower and any themed party inside or outside, which makes your party more special.
Premium Quality- Colorful balloons are made from premium Eco-friendly latex material which is durable and long-lasting quality with no smell, safe to use around children.

Set Includes- Each sets contains 100pcs assorted party balloons of 12 inches 10 colors ( red, yellow, royal blue, light blue, lime green, light green, pink, purple, dark purple, orange) and 1pcs white ribbon (33 feet total).The right amount quantity and most suitable color for each party decoration.

Warm Tips- Multicolored Party Balloons can be inflated with air or helium. The best floating time for helium balloons is no longer than 24 hours. Matching with other balloons is also a good idea for your balloon party decoration.

We Are Always Ready to Help- We are very confident with the quality of our assorted rainbow balloons for we used grade A quality materials. Its production process is being monitored to secure its quality. If you have any problems or unsatisfied, please email us first. We are always here for you in 24 hours.
a_plus_content: From the brand Enjoy Your Party with Balloons. For wedding, birthday, baby shower, graduation, jungle theme, bridal shower, Christmas, Halloween party etc. Welcome to Bezente! Bezente prioritizes the perfect pairing of balloon quality and color for every event. We understand the significance of creating unforgettable memories, and strive to ensure your parties stay in your guests' memories for years to come. Our mission is to bring perfection to your celebrations with high-quality balloons, available in a range of beautiful hues. That's what Bezente exists for.
